_comment: Species: Vermilion Bird (朱雀) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Vermilion Bird

canonical.appearance: Divine bird 30 m wingspan, feathers the color of molten fire, three tail feathers trail nine-color flame
canonical.size: 30 m wingspan, 100000 jin; true form fills the sky
canonical.behavior: Divine spirit beast; sleeps for epochs; awakens to choose Divine Emperor; rivals Azure Dragon
canonical.habitat: Vermilion Bird Divine Sect, Vermilion Bird Starfield core, fire-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: fire-attribute heavenly treasures, tribulation flames, sun-essence
canonical.relationships: Bonded to Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor (Wang Lin was 6th generation); rival of Azure Dragon
canonical.bloodline: True Divine Beast lineage; one of Four Symbols
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: vermilion_bird — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
